beforeCommit.command: ! grep -rn 'production.ready\|fully.integrated\|battle.tested\|enterprise.grade\|zero.overhead' --include='*.md' --include='*.yml' /home/user/Nexus/docs/ /home/user/Nexus/README.md /home/user/Nexus/CHANGELOG.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'BLOCKED: overclaim wording detected in docs — rephrase before committing'
